Hi! 😊 Thank you for reaching out to CINNOX. This is Tony. How may I help you?
您好，感谢您联系CINNOX客服，请问有什么可以协助您的地方？

Hi,

I want to check that Cinnox provides the services we are looking for.

We require 10-20 local Hong Kong phone numbers that we can recieve and read texts from.
We would like to rent the same numbers for over a year at a time, could you let me know what the pricing would be?
sure, let me find the document for you
Could you also send me the API docs
a moment

Here is the priceing page for CINNOX.
https://www.cinnox.com/pricing.html

And the link below is for the charge for each number/traffic.
https://www.cinnox.com/documents/CINNOX_Official-Rate-List_202209-v2.xlsx

If you are intersted in nowing more about the numbers and fees, you may leave your name, company and contacts, I will pass your information to sales team, and they can give you detailed information. 😊
https://www.cinnox.com/contact-sales-buy-virtual-number

CINNOX API Reference:
 https://docs.cinnox.com/reference/getting-started-with-the-open-api
Need sales to further intro about Cinnox ability and price?
I had read this pricing doc but it wasn't clear. Does the Omnichannel Contact Center provide access to multiple virtual phone numbers?
Multiple numbers could be supported
Maybe customer using more than one Virtual number
Many customers
Some customer service center even has dozens
But is that included in the omnichanel contact center?
I also wanted to ask whether these numbers are new or if they have been used before
No the basic service plan and each number monthly fee is independent.
What is the monthly fee per number

For more detail, ,may I add our sales to further intro for you?
A moment please
Yes
Do you prefer Chinese sales or in English?
English please
OK a moment
room.leave
room.join
enquiry.transfer.picked.up
Hi, Sam, this is Gina Wong from Sales team.

Hello,

My name is Sam.

Our company is looking to rent between 10 to 20 HK local phone numbers.

The usecase is to recieve OTP from the services we use (specifically hosting / banking providers) so that our team can access the codes seamlessly.

We would not require any calling capabilities.

We would want to rent the same numbers for very long periods of time (over a year).
Does this sound like a usecase that Cinnox can assist with? If so, what would be the per number monthly pricing.
The HK DID number is US$25/number/month
We can manage all incoming texts via an API correct?
So, you can leverage CINNOX SMS API to recieve OTP.
Yes
Also, Is there any scenario where the phone numbers we rent would experience downtime  / be disconnected permanently?
No.....you just use these numbers for SMS, right? NO need to call as your said, correct?
Correct
no downtime so far
Ok perfect thank you
You can refer to CINNOX online guide here about the API - Send SMS (https://docs.cinnox.com/reference/send-sms)
How long does the onboarding process typically take?
I can continue to follow up with you and share more details information via this email (sam@sambermail.com), right?
Yes
And also, this is your phone number (+886966214965), correct?
You can subscribe a FREE Trial via my link. https://cinnox.grsm.io/ginawongeb
Yes but I prefer all communication via email
It takes 15-30 seconds to complete the basic setup for a new user.
No problem. I can send over the related information to you for hte review first.
I am preparing the information and I will send it to you via email. Let's keep in touch there from now on. Thx for your enquiry.
